architectural_notes: Current notifications are in-app toast messages shown only while the app is open/active; no background push support available yet.

existing_features.title: Add persisted per-user notification preferences so each signed-in user can customize which in-app activities trigger notifications and how notifications visually appear.
Frontend: implement an in-app notification system (using the existing toast/toaster setup) that can emit notifications for supported activities and respects the user’s trigger preferences.
Frontend: add a user-facing settings UI to customize notification triggers and visual appearance, and persist changes to the backend.
Frontend: apply the selected visual appearance settings consistently to all in-app notifications (styling, placement, and any icons/colors).

new_feature_requests.summary: Integrate a weather API and display weather info in the app (location/placement TBD)
Allow customization of in-app notifications: which activities trigger them and how they look (visual style/placement)
Add support for push notifications when the app is closed/minimized (notify user when platform support becomes available)
Backend: extend the existing UserProfile model and APIs to support notification preferences, including query/update methods for the caller.

projectName: Add customizable in-app notification triggers and appearance settings
